nasb.text: And those who dwell on the earth will rejoice over them and celebrate; and they will send gifts to one another, because these two prophets tormented those who dwell on the earth.

esv.text: and those who dwell on the earth will rejoice over them and make merry and exchange presents, because these two prophets had been a torment to those who dwell on the earth.

cnv.text: 住在地上的人為了他們的緣故，就歡喜快樂，彼此送禮，因為這兩位先知曾經使他們受痛苦。

ccb.text: 地上万民便兴高采烈，互相送礼道贺，因为这两位先知曾使地上的人受苦。

csbs.text: 住在地上的人都因他们的死而欢喜、庆祝，并且要彼此送礼，因为这两位先知曾使住在地上的人受痛苦。
